general.description: Originally created by a large pit created by the spontaneous and unexpected landing of a large ship, the Pit has grown through usage by Free Traders over time. The depth of the impact provides cover from the harsh atmospheric winds, with haphazard constructions slowly creeping out, to inevitably get ripped off during strong seasonal storms, along with some of the more careless inhabitants too. Even though there is technically life support, most people wear light atmospheric suits with the front open just in case an emergency hits. Can never be too careful when there are no building regulations to be seen.
general.bar: Due to the limited size of the crater, and the difficulties with digging deeper into the planet mantle, space is a premium at the Pit. At the centre of it all, and with a premium location, the Pit Pit bar is the place to be, where the groans of the atmospheric shielding under the turbulent winds are drowned out by the sound of drinking and bantering.
